fundamentals.long_business_summary: Yaashvi Jewellers Limited engages in manufacturing and trading of jewellery in India. It offers rings, pendants, chains, necklaces, anklets, bracelets, bangles, earrings, mangalsutra, designer gold jewellery, designer silver jewellery, diamond jewellery, gold bullions, customized jewellery, various jewelleries, etc., as well as plain, named, and rose gold jewellery. The company also trades in studded gold and fashion silver jewellery, diamond jewellery, gold bullion, and customized jewellery. It sells its products through dealers, showrooms, small jewellery shops, jewellery exhibitions, direct sales force, and Internet. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Jaipur, India.
